title: RNA re-precipitation protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dm751","text":"If the RNA you have extracted is not pure and contains some residual contamination, as shown by poor Nanodrop ratios, you can reprecipitate the RNA, wash it and re-dissolve it to purify it.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"IrWQu","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"2vEaA","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"jWO2t","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":4094,"guid":"410697ED341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"ethanol","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":203638,"guid":"41ABEEC3341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Sodium Acetate Anhydrous Certified AR for Analysis Fisher Chemical ","mol_weight":0,"sku":"S/2120/53","url":"https://www.fishersci.co.uk/shop/products/sodium-acetate-anhydrous-certified-ar-analysis-3/p-7073501","cas_number":"127-09-3","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":31,"name":"Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.fishersci.com/us/en/home.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Add 10% volume 3M sodium acetate pH 5.2 and 250% volume ethanol. So if your RNA solution is 100 ul, add 10 ul NaAc solution and 250 ul ethanol.
Mix well and put on dry ice for 30 min or -20 overnight
Centrifuge max speed 30 min at 4 C, remove supernatant
3 washes with 75% ethanol kept on dry ice. For example, add 900 ul 75% ethanol, centrifuge 5 min at max speed (~ 21,000 g), remove ethanol, three times.
Assess the quality of the RNA using Nanodrop and Qubit.
creator: Cristian Riccio
